{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Karitamineno Shrine | native_name = 苅田嶺神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Karitamineno Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 苅田嶺神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Karitamineno Shrine'''|苅田嶺神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].
